title: stelis robustior
intro: Stelis robustior, also known as the False Yellow Orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, with its medicinal properties attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antibacterial agent. The health benefits of Stelis robustior include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, making it a valuable resource in natural medicine. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
